pi_items.source: Consistent across task.json (line 16), setup_task.sh (line 39), and task description (line 5)
Consistent across task.json (line 17), setup_task.sh (line 40), and task description (line 5)
Consistent across task.json (line 18), setup_task.sh (line 41), and task description (line 5). Date format matches ISO 8601 standard for OSCAR EMR
Consistent across task.json (line 19), setup_task.sh (line 42), and task description (line 5). Matches OSCAR database schema which uses 'F'/'M' for sex field
Verified via web search: 350 Bay Street is a real commercial building in Toronto's Financial District (13-storey 1928 Art Deco building). Used fictionally in this task
Consistent across task.json (line 21), setup_task.sh (line 44), and task description (line 5). Correct city for 350 Bay Street address
Consistent across task.json (line 22), setup_task.sh (line 45), and task description (line 5). Ontario is the correct province for Toronto
Verified via web search: M5H 2S6 is the official postal code for 350 Bay Street, Toronto, Ontario. Confirmed on multiple real estate and commercial property listing sites

Verified via web search: 416 is a valid Toronto area code. The 555 exchange is reserved in North America specifically for fictional use in media, TV, and applications (confirmed via Wikipedia, CBC, and FCC standards)
Consistent across task.json (line 25), setup_task.sh (line 48), and task description (line 5). Synthetic test email address

Verified against Ontario health card specification: Ontario health numbers are 10-digit numbers (confirmed via Ontario government health card validation documentation). Format 9001234567 follows the required 10-digit structure but is synthetic data (simple sequential digits)
Verified in task_utils.sh (line 140), setup_oscar.sh (line 7), and Firefox profile settings (setup_oscar.sh line 295). OSCAR EMR runs on localhost port 8080 via Docker container 'oscar-app'
Verified in setup_oscar.sh (line 217, 238), setup_task.sh (line 51). oscardoc is the standard test provider account in OSCAR EMR linked to provider_no 999998
Verified in setup_oscar.sh (line 210, 217). Password stored as SHA-1 hash (45-179-551441115-117798-30877213-3052-6889-30-60). Test credential for oscardoc account
Verified in setup_oscar.sh (line 217), setup_task.sh (line 51), and docker-compose.yml comment. OSCAR EMR PIN field for additional authentication (optional but configured in test environment)

Verified in docker-compose.yml (line 25). OpenOSP is the official Docker deployment toolkit for OSCAR EMR. Confirmed via GitHub (https://github.com/open-osp/open-osp) and official OpenOSP documentation
Verified in docker-compose.yml (line 5) and setup_oscar.sh (line 89, 102-103). MariaDB 10.5 is the database backend for OSCAR EMR
Verified via OpenOSP documentation and confirmed in setup_oscar.sh (line 176, spring_managers.xml path). OSCAR runs as Java WAR deployed in Tomcat

privileged_info_summary: Emily Nakamura is a synthetic test patient to be registered in the OSCAR EMR system. Patient data includes real address (350 Bay Street, Toronto, ON M5H 2S6 - a documented commercial building) but uses fictional phone number (416-555-0201, where 555 is reserved for fictional use in North America). Health card number 9001234567 is synthetic but follows correct Ontario format. OSCAR EMR is a real open-source Electronic Medical Record system deployed via Docker using openosp/open-osp:release image with MariaDB 10.5 database. Login credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN 1117) are standard test credentials in OSCAR environment. Task requires GUI automation to navigate OSCAR interface and register new patient via Demographic Search page.
